PassThroughGate.description: Drives through the midpoint between one green and one red tower or buoy pair. Use for gate and towergate tasks. Input both objects. Do NOT use for speedgate.

SearchPattern.description: Executes a search pattern for objects marked [estimated]. Use when a required object is [estimated]. Do NOT use if object is already [detected].

DriveSpeedgate.description: Executes the full speedgate sequence atomically. Use ONLY for speedgate tasks. REQUIRES: green buoy, red buoy, beacon, and yellow buoy all [detected].

ShootWater.description: Drives to the target and shoots water for 10 seconds. Use for water delivery tasks. REQUIRES: target [detected].

HoldPosition.description: Stops and holds current position. Always the final step of any task.
